name: How much money can I get for falling off a ladder at my job?
description: $50K-$200K typical; based on medical costs, lost pay, disability.

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for falling off a ladder at my job?

acceptedAnswer.text: $50K-$200K typical; based on medical costs, lost pay, disability.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Settlements average $50K-$200K+ depending on injury severity, lost wages, and permanency.**

Factors: medical bills, time off work, disability rating. Back fractures or concussions boost value.

- Temporary benefits: 2/3 wages during recovery.
- Permanent: based on impairment schedule.
- Pain/suffering not covered in workers' comp.

Get a free case evaluation; Utah/Idaho caps apply for severe cases. Multipliers for surgery/lifelong issues.[5]
